meta.purpose: Jubilee medical provider/hospital panel lookup -- Uganda, as at Jan 2026
meta.usage_note: This is a lookup dataset (hospital/clinic name, address, contact, services, operating hours, region), NOT product knowledge. Use it only to answer 'is X hospital on the panel' / 'what providers are near me' type questions. Never use it to answer benefit or coverage questions -- that's jubilee_products_kb.json's job. Classified as confidential by Jubilee in the source document -- handle access accordingly once this moves past MVP (e.g. don't expose the full raw contact list in a public-facing chat without checking with Jubilee what's OK to surface).
